articles.author: Rebecca Bellan
articles.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web - TechCrunch
articles.description: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.
articles.content:
Claude Cowork Anthropic’s Claude Code-style agent for general knowledge work is coming to your phone. 
Claude Cowork launched as a desktop app in January, but starting Tuesday it is available on web… [+3521 chars]
